last_training_run.name: fatigue-test
last_training_run.notes: Fatigue fix validated — early eps show fatigue near 0, positive returns achieved

known_issues: Reflex overrides still high in some episodes (40-90) but fatigue no longer always maxes
Agent still starves most episodes despite eating occasionally
next_actions: Plan and implement Stage 4: Global Workspace — limited-capacity broadcast system
Stage 4 requires: workspace buffer, competition for access, broadcast to subsystems
Consider Stage 4a holonomic integration alongside or after Stage 4

completed_stages.0: Embodied sandbox — env, agent, reward, logging
completed_stages.1: Homeostatic organism — reflexes, actor-critic, TD learning
completed_stages.2: Predictive control — world model, surprise signal, sleep consolidation
completed_stages.3: Partial observability and memory — episodic recall, food_visible_range, validated via ablation
